video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Overhead: hands unpack the candle kit — a wax block, vacuum-packed wax, and supply packets laid on the bench.
windows.description_detailed: Overhead: hands unpack the candle kit — a wax block, vacuum-packed wax, and supply packets laid on the bench. prep phase, ~0% in, 0:00–0:07.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Kit packets, the electronic hotplate and a metal melting pan are arranged for the build.
windows.description_detailed: Kit packets, the electronic hotplate and a metal melting pan are arranged for the build. prep phase, ~7% in, 0:07–0:15.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Vacuum-packed white wax bricks are laid out and portioned into the pan.
windows.description_detailed: Vacuum-packed white wax bricks are laid out and portioned into the pan. prep phase, ~14% in, 0:15–0:23.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: White wax melts in the metal pan on the electronic hotplate, stirred with a stick.
windows.description_detailed: White wax melts in the metal pan on the electronic hotplate, stirred with a stick. process phase, ~21% in, 0:23–0:31.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Continued stirring of the melting white wax in the pan.
windows.description_detailed: Continued stirring of the melting white wax in the pan. process phase, ~29% in, 0:31–0:39.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Molten wax is poured into a glass and stirred with a stick.
windows.description_detailed: Molten wax is poured into a glass and stirred with a stick. assemble phase, ~36% in, 0:39–0:47. Terminology: container candle.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: The glass holds poured wax; hands work with the pan alongside.
windows.description_detailed: The glass holds poured wax; hands work with the pan alongside. assemble phase, ~43% in, 0:47–0:55.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Green colour is introduced — a metal pitcher of wax turns green.
windows.description_detailed: Green colour is introduced — a metal pitcher of wax turns green. process phase, ~50% in, 0:55–1:02.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Green molten wax is stirred in the pitcher.
windows.description_detailed: Green molten wax is stirred in the pitcher. process phase, ~57% in, 1:02–1:10.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Green wax is poured into the glass; a clip holds the wick centred.
windows.description_detailed: Green wax is poured into the glass; a clip holds the wick centred. assemble phase, ~64% in, 1:10–1:18. Terminology: container candle.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Hands adjust the wick peg/clip on the glass rim as the wax sets.
windows.description_detailed: Hands adjust the wick peg/clip on the glass rim as the wax sets. assemble phase, ~71% in, 1:18–1:26.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description: Hands smooth/finish the candle top on a tray.
windows.description_detailed: Hands smooth/finish the candle top on a tray. finish phase, ~79% in, 1:26–1:34.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description_detailed: Decorative branded end card ('PERFECT REVIEW'). aux phase, ~86% in, 1:34–1:42.

windows.video_title: Candle Making Kit with Electronic Hot Plate for Beginners, Adults, and Kids
windows.description_detailed: Branded end card. Outro - subscribe call to action, end card, thanks for watching. aux phase, ~93% in, 1:42–1:50.
